item.title: Shreeoswal Seeds & Chemicals Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Shreeoswal Seeds & Chemicals Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raises concerns about sustained weakness in the near to medium term. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Arvee Laboratories Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Arvee Laboratories (India) Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: PSP Projects Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: PSP Projects Ltd, a small-cap player in the construction sector, has recently formed a Death Cross—a technical pattern where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average—indicating a potential shift towards a bearish trend and signalling long-term weakness in the stock’s price momentum. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Danube Industries Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: Danube Industries Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raises concerns about long-term weakness amid already challenging market conditions. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Fortis Healthcare Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Fortis Healthcare Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raising concerns about its medium to long-term outlook. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: BN Agrochem Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: BN Agrochem Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development highlights a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raises concerns about its long-term price strength amid already challenging market conditions. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Zuari Agro Chemicals Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Zuari Agro Chemicals Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average, signalling a potential shift towards a prolonged bearish trend. This development comes amid deteriorating price momentum and weak fundamentals, raising concerns about the stock’s near- and long-term outlook. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Ravindra Energy Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Ravindra Energy Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raising concerns about its medium to long-term outlook. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Outlook
item.description: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development highlights a deterioration in the stock’s medium-term momentum and raises concerns about sustained weakness in the coming months. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Ishan Dyes and Chemicals Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: Ishan Dyes and chemicals Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Specialty Chemicals sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-DMA. This technical development is widely regarded as a bearish signal, indicating a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raising concerns about its long-term price weakness. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: GHV Infra Projects Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: GHV Infra Projects Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development often signals a shift towards a bearish trend and suggests a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum, raising concerns among investors about potential weakness ahead. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd. Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd. has recently formed a Golden Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) has crossed above the 200-day moving average. This development is widely regarded as a bullish signal, suggesting a potential long-term trend reversal and a shift in momentum favouring upward price movement. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Tata Capital Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.309.1
item.description: Tata Capital Ltd, a prominent player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.309.1, marking a significant price level for the stock amid broader market weakness and sectoral pressures. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Wework India Management Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.424
item.description: Wework India Management Ltd’s shares declined sharply to a new 52-week low of Rs.424 on 9 March 2026, marking a significant drop amid a broader market downturn. The stock has underperformed its sector and the wider indices, reflecting ongoing pressures within the diversified commercial services space. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: EPack Prefab Technologies Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.153.45
item.description: EPack Prefab Technologies Ltd has declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.153.45, marking a significant downturn in the stock’s price trajectory amid broader market pressures and sectoral headwinds. Time: 50 minutes ago
